service: REPLACE WITH: the one-sentence service definition from 01-service-definition.md

evals.description: REPLACE WITH: one sentence describing what this case tests
evals.source: REPLACE WITH: where this case came from — e.g. 'historical ticket #1234', 'Priya interview 2025-04'

expected_output.decision: REPLACE WITH: what the agent should decide
expected_output.action: REPLACE WITH: what the agent should do
expected_output.notes: REPLACE WITH: anything a reviewer needs to know when checking this case

evals.description: REPLACE WITH: an edge case — unusual but has a clear rule

expected_output.decision: REPLACE WITH: what the agent should decide
expected_output.notes: REPLACE WITH: which rule in 03-decision-rules.md covers this

evals.description: REPLACE WITH: a hard case — non-obvious; a smart new hire would likely get it wrong
evals.source: REPLACE WITH: source — hard cases should come from real history, not imagination

expected_output.escalation_reason: REPLACE WITH: why this specific case escalates
expected_output.notes: REPLACE WITH: what the wrong answer looks like and why someone would pick it
